name: Ibuprofen 200mg
description: Provides fast and temporary relief of minor aches and pains associated with headaches, muscle aches, backaches, toothaches, menstrual cramps, and minor arthritis pain. Also temporarily reduces fever.

name: Claritin Allergy Relief 24hr
description: Provides 24-hour, non-drowsy relief of symptoms caused by pollen, mold, dust mites, and pet dander. Temporarily relieves runny nose, sneezing, itchy, watery eyes, and itching of the nose or throat.

name: Daily Multi-Vitamin Plus
description: A comprehensive formula of essential vitamins and minerals tailored for daily vitality, immune system support, and muscle function. Formulated with high-potency Vitamin C, D3, E, and Zinc.

name: CoQ10 Heart Support 100mg
description: Supports heart health and cellular energy production. Coenzyme Q10 is a vital antioxidant that helps defend cells against oxidative stress. Ideal for maintaining healthy cardiovascular function.
